experiment_2.Task: Classify skin-lesion diagnosis from image data in Galaxy while avoiding leakage from related or augmented examples.
experiment_2.Prompt: I have a metadata table and an archive of skin-lesion images from a biomedical study. I want a Galaxy analysis that predicts the diagnosis from the images while avoiding obvious leakage between related or augmented examples. Please choose a sensible Galaxy approach, evaluate it on a held-out test split, and tell me the target column you used and the test ROC-AUC.
